D

defaultRoute - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.RouterConfig
 
DELAYED_REQUEST - Static variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
 
description - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.TranslationsMap
 
deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.JsonAddressDeserializer
 
deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.JsonIPAddressDeserializer
 
deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.JsonUriDeserializer
 
deserializeKey(String, DeserializationContext) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.InetAddressKeyDeserializer
 
directory - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.logging.LogParameters
 
domainPath - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.config.SettingsManager
 
doNotProcess(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
Tells the B2buaServlet not to send the outbound request.
doNotProcess(SipServletRequest, int) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
Tells the B2buaServlet not to send the outbound request and send a reply back upstream with the supplied status code.
doNotProcess(SipServletRequest, int, String) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
Tells the B2buaServlet not to send the outbound request and send a reply back upstream with the supplied status code and custom reason phrase.
doRequest(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
 
doResponse(SipServletResponse) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
